summary.exit: 無 P0 且 P1 ≤ 2 → Phase 1 收斂;5 條全折進 design v4

findings.problem: refresh 每次重跑 _build_and_store → 每按一次重新整理就重跑 20-60s rebuild(輸入未變)
findings.resolution: accepted — v4 archive_from_snapshot 回傳 wrote bool,run_post_build 僅 wrote=True 才 rebuild

findings.problem: backfill 完成的 rebuild 觸發可 join 到早於其寫檔的 in-flight rebuild → 短窗結果 stale 至下一交易日
findings.resolution: accepted — v4 rebuild 完成時比對開始/完成的檔集合,不一致同 key 內自我再跑一輪(max 1 次)

findings.problem: backfill 自 today 起走與 daily archive 對今日檔雙寫者、terms_approx 誤標
findings.resolution: accepted — v4 backfill 起點改 today-1,今日檔一律留給 daily 路徑;回看窗 +1

findings.problem: 檔存在但權證缺席時補 null 或略過未定,略過會壓縮 x index(R5 問題回歸)+ 圖表跳日
findings.resolution: accepted — v4 明定日期軸 = 最近 60 檔日期集合,缺席補 {date, null, null};測試加中段缺席 case

findings.location: §6 降階條款量測 + IO yield
findings.problem: rebuild 無 timing log(>60s 判定不可重現);60 檔同步 parse 段無 yield
findings.resolution: accepted — v4 rebuild 完成 logger.info 帶耗時(沿 _build_snapshot 樣板);load 迴圈每檔 sleep(0)
